title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout is a cloud cost-management B2B SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of the go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations/Sales Ops in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A leader-doer mindset comfortable building flows, dashboards, and data models is essential.
score_reason: Omri is a near-perfect match: 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps exceeds the 7+ year requirement, Finout's cloud cost-management focus aligns with his fintech/SaaS scaling expertise, and his Salesforce admin + pipeline forecasting skills directly address the hands-on leadership needs. The only minor gap is no explicit mention of $30M+ ARR scaling experience, but seniority level suggests this.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS is exactly what they're building toward as they expand beyond Tel Aviv and New York. With your deep Salesforce expertise and track record translating revenue analytics into operational scale, you'd be the leader-doer they need to architect their next growth phase. Worth a conversation?

I'd love to explore how my Salesforce and pipeline forecasting expertise could accelerate your market expansion roadmap.

title: GTM Engineer

Requires 3+ years in marketing operations or GTM engineering at B2B SaaS, with strong technical skills around APIs and webhooks.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps/GTM background and technical skillset. The role's focus on data pipelines, CRM integration, lead scoring, and growth experimentation directly matches his core expertise, though it leans slightly more technical/engineering than pure RevOps leadership.

With 15+ years optimizing GTM stacks, I've owned everything from email deliverability and domain warming to building data pipelines between marketing, CRM, and sales tools. I'd be interested in exploring how my experience shipping growth experiments and automating lead scoring/routing could help accelerate Pylon's GTM velocity.

title: GTM Engineer
